item.title: LGBTQ ally
item.dc:creator: pilomotor

item.title: If you need help with medical bills
item.description:
@Ranlothir 's post yesterday reminded me - if you need assistance with medical bills, Christy Snodgrass https://www.instagram.com/p/CdE8xQ3LdSv has been a warrior in dispensing advice on how to negotiate lower costs. Her instagram feed is filled with a ton of advice and additional tactics on how to help.
segment 2
segment 3 also, @Balikadam shared this video with some great resources: https://imgur.com/gallery/we-should-share-as-many-people-as-possible-who-might-need-medical-bill-help-CtNDGxz
item.dc:creator: lydecker17

item.title: It was a struggle but I kept going.
item.description: It was really challenging. I couldn't get the leg drive I was hoping for. It was disappointing and a really struggle. I kept going through. Next time will be better. I hope everyone has a wonderful day.

item.title: Desserts around the world ep 26: Brazilian sweet treat Bala Baiana
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/@cafecouffee Ingredients: 1 can/ 397g sweetened condensed milk, 40g unslated butter, 85g dessicated coconuts or coconut flakes, 1 cup/ 210g granulated sugar, 1/2 cup / 125ml water 1/2 tsp vinegar
item.dc:creator: Pineappleinthepoopshoot

item.title: Taking a rest day.
item.description: I have a lot going on today, so I need the rest today. I need to not be distracted while I put my ducks in a row. Make a time to take a break. Stretch, breathe, unclench your muscles, and relax. Take that time to just be present and exist and reorganize your thoughts and priorities for the near future. I'll see y'all next Mjonday.
item.dc:creator: Icouri

item.title: How about a dump in these trying times?
item.description: Reposted due to technical issues
item.dc:creator: ConfederacyOfDunces

item.title: Images of Note: It is time for others harm
item.description:
mood
>:V
floop
hell yeah
I dreamt there was a railway station with a pub near me and there were people rioting over nothing.
:D Murder!
OwO
oh no
:D
DIGGY DIGGY HOLE
DIO!
OxO
Father Jack just looks with confusion as he thinks the little horse is a figment of his drunken imagination.
ARSON!
Why is Junior holding the fries up like a fucking phone?
You joke but the day I realized Druimnadrochaid literally meant "Bridge Ridge" I lost my mind.
c:
AAAAAAAAAAAAAA
O _ O
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky Possums. That's it, that's the post.
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Scientists find a 35,000-year-old saber-toothed kitten in the Siberian permafrost
item.description: "An "almost perfectly preserved" saber-toothed cub has been unearthed in Russia's Sakha Republic, 35,000 years after it died. The cat is of the species Homotherium latidens, a distant relative of the more familiar Smilodon." CLONE THE KITTY! https://www.npr.org/2024/11/16/nx-s1-5193845/35000-year-old-kitten-siberia-frozen
item.dc:creator: jarable

New manga posted every Monday

item.title: Hostile Architecture.
item.description: (1) Metal, Hip-Height Posts Screwed iNTO the Ground, Spaced Closely Together, Near a StoreFront Entrance to Prevent Homeless People from Sleeping There; and a Homeless Man Sleeping on Top of Them with the Help of a BoxSpring & Mattress.

Peyto lake
